all.en: Dear Ms. Chen, we are pleased to share important news about your compensation.
all.zh: 親愛的陳女士，我們很高興與您分享有關您薪酬的重要訊息。

all.en: Following our annual review cycle, your base salary will be adjusted upward.
all.zh: 經年度檢視後，您的底薪將獲得向上調整。

all.en: This adjustment reflects your strong contributions over the past year.
all.zh: 此次調整反映您過去一年的卓越貢獻。

all.en: Your new annual base salary will be one million two hundred thousand NTD.
all.zh: 您新的年度底薪為新台幣一百二十萬元。

all.en: This represents an increase of approximately seven percent over your prior rate.
all.zh: 此金額較您先前薪資增加約百分之七。

all.en: The adjusted rate will take effect on the first day of next month.
all.zh: 調整後的薪資將自下個月一日起生效。

all.en: It will be reflected in the payroll deposit at the end of that month.
all.zh: 並將於該月月底的薪資撥款中反映。

all.en: In addition, your performance bonus for the year totals eighty thousand NTD.
all.zh: 此外，您的年度績效獎金合計新台幣八萬元。

all.en: The bonus payment will be issued together with next month standard payroll.
all.zh: 獎金將與下個月的常規薪資一同發放。

all.en: Your equity grant will also be refreshed under the standard four-year schedule.
all.zh: 您的股權授予也將依標準四年期程獲得續發。

all.en: Specific equity details will be sent through the stock plan administrator portal.
all.zh: 詳細股權資訊將透過股票計畫管理入口寄出。

all.en: Your benefits package remains unchanged at the current premium tier.
all.zh: 您的福利方案維持現行最高等級不變。

all.en: This decision was made based on multiple performance and market factors.
all.zh: 本決定係依據多項績效及市場因素做出。

all.en: We considered your individual results, peer benchmarks, and external salary surveys.
all.zh: 我們參考了您的個人成果、同儕基準及外部薪資調查。

all.en: Your willingness to mentor junior colleagues stood out in this review cycle.
all.zh: 您願意指導資淺同仁的表現於本次檢視中尤其突出。

all.en: Your leadership during last quarter product launch was particularly impressive.
all.zh: 您於上一季產品上市期間的領導表現尤其令人印象深刻。

all.en: We hope this adjustment reflects how much we value your continued commitment.
all.zh: 我們希望此調整能反映我們對您持續投入的高度重視。

all.en: Please remember that compensation information is strictly confidential.
all.zh: 請切記薪酬資訊屬於嚴格機密。

all.en: Share these details only with your direct family or financial advisor.
all.zh: 請僅與直系親屬或財務顧問分享相關細節。

all.en: Should you have any questions, please contact the human resources business partner.
all.zh: 若有任何疑問，請聯絡您的人資業務夥伴。

all.en: Please acknowledge receipt by signing the electronic letter within seven days.
all.zh: 請於七日內簽署電子信函以確認收到。

all.en: Thank you for the dedication and integrity you bring to our organization.
all.zh: 感謝您為本組織帶來的投入與誠信。

all.en: We look forward to your continued growth in the coming year.
all.zh: 我們期待您於來年持續成長。

all.en: Your manager will discuss expanded responsibilities during the next one on one meeting.
all.zh: 您的主管將於下次一對一會議中討論擴大的職責範圍。

all.en: We have nominated you for our cross regional leadership development program.
all.zh: 我們已提名您參與跨區域領導力發展計畫。

all.en: The program runs for six months and includes mentorship from senior executives.
all.zh: 該計畫為期六個月，並包含資深主管的指導。

all.en: A new title aligned with your scope will appear in the internal directory shortly.
all.zh: 與您職責範圍相符的新職稱不久後將於內部目錄中顯示。

all.en: Updated job description and goals will be uploaded to the performance system.
all.zh: 更新後的職務說明書與目標將上傳至績效系統。

all.en: Please confirm your acceptance by signing the attached acknowledgment form.
all.zh: 請簽署所附確認表單以確認您的接受。

all.en: Tax implications of the increase should be reviewed with your personal advisor.
all.zh: 調薪的稅務影響建議與您的個人顧問討論。

all.en: Direct deposit details will remain the same unless you submit a change request.
all.zh: 除非您提出變更申請，否則直接匯款資訊將維持不變。

all.en: Year end statements will summarize total compensation across all categories.
all.zh: 年終報表將彙整所有類別的總薪酬。

all.en: Once again, congratulations on this well deserved recognition of your work.
all.zh: 再次恭喜您獲得對工作表現實至名歸的肯定。

all.en: Retirement contribution matching will increase in line with your new base salary.
all.zh: 退休金提撥配比將隨您的新底薪同步調升。

all.en: Your eligibility for long term incentive grants has been formally elevated.
all.zh: 您獲取長期激勵授予的資格已正式提升。

all.en: A revised confidentiality reminder is included as part of this acknowledgment package.
all.zh: 本確認文件中包含更新版的保密提醒。

all.en: Internal mobility options remain open should you wish to explore future roles.
all.zh: 若您日後希望探索新角色，內部輪調選項仍持續開放。

all.en: Annual recognition events will feature your contributions to the leadership cohort.
all.zh: 年度表揚活動將彰顯您對領導梯隊的貢獻。

all.en: Coaching sessions with external executive coaches are available upon request.
all.zh: 可依需求申請外部高階教練的輔導課程。

all.en: Travel budget allocations for client visits will be expanded in the coming quarter.
all.zh: 下一季用於客戶拜訪的差旅預算將擴大。

all.en: Updated emergency contact details should be verified through the employee portal.
all.zh: 更新後的緊急聯絡資料請透過員工入口網站確認。

all.en: Sabbatical eligibility now applies after every five years of continuous service.
all.zh: 每連續服務滿五年後即可申請進修假。

all.en: We celebrate your milestone with sincere appreciation and high expectations ahead.
all.zh: 我們以誠摯感謝慶祝您的里程碑，並對未來抱有高度期待。

all.en: Honestly, Ms. Chen, your manager personally fought for this adjustment during the budget calibration meeting.
all.zh: 陳女士，說真的，您的主管在預算校準會議中親自為這次調薪奮力爭取。

all.en: If it feels right, treat your family to a nice dinner this weekend; you have certainly earned it.
all.zh: 若您覺得合適，這個週末帶家人去吃頓好的吧，這絕對是您應得的。

all.en: Several teammates dropped by to share how much they appreciated you coaching them through their first project.
all.zh: 好幾位隊友特地過來告訴我，他們有多感謝您帶領他們度過第一個專案。

all.en: Honestly, the toughest part of writing this letter was finding words that match the warmth your team feels.
all.zh: 說真的，撰寫這封信最難的部分，是要找出能對應團隊對您那份溫暖感受的字眼。

all.en: Please feel free to swing by my office anytime for a coffee and a chat about what's next.
all.zh: 歡迎隨時來我辦公室喝杯咖啡，聊聊接下來的規劃。

all.en: I still remember the day you joined; you were nervous about the elevator security card during onboarding.
all.zh: 我還記得您剛加入那天，新人報到時連電梯門禁卡都讓您有點緊張。

all.en: Your colleagues in the Singapore office asked me to pass along their congratulations as well.
all.zh: 新加坡辦公室的同仁也請我轉達他們的祝賀。

all.en: Take a quiet weekend to enjoy this news before diving back into next quarter's launch planning.
all.zh: 請給自己一個安靜的週末好好享受這個消息，再回頭投入下一季的上市規劃。

all.en: Looking ahead, we genuinely cannot wait to see how you shape the team over the next twelve months.
all.zh: 展望未來，我們真心期待看到您於未來十二個月如何形塑這個團隊。

all.en: Warmest regards, and thank you for being someone the rest of us look up to every day.
all.zh: 致上最深的祝福，謝謝您是大家每天都仰望學習的對象。
